title: Smooth-MC
description: A clientside modpack focusing only on improving minecrafts performance.
body:
This **clientside** modpack improves minecrafts performance in the most popular versions. _Shaders are supported_. Do not update any mod or things may break!

Download Acedium for additional Performance here (for Forge only): [Acedium](https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium/releases)

## **Before and After (Fabric 1.21):**

![Fabric 1.21 without this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27ced317f5dd98e88dd4e57e54ccb2d4e8dbea3a.jpeg)

![Fabric 1.21 with this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6e8f9f3d21fc2f268937f0ef74835e3bffbf73.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Mods used:</summary>

[Alfheim Lighting Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alfheim-lighting-engine)

[C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)

[Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/canary)

[Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

[Red Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/red-core)
